title: Table and Record Management on TXT
breadcrumbs: Table and Record Management on TXT
text: Table and Record Management on TXT Table Management Tables are created on the fly at runtime. Record Management You may not update or delete records from within Uniface; you are allowed only to add new records. Field Management The TXT connector does not manage fields. When you create a table at run time, the TXT connector creates a text file to which all of your records are sequentially added in a character string format. You cannot update or delete existing records with this connector. You can only read and append new records. Table names must comply with Uniface naming rules. The file names must also comply with the rules of the operating system. Variable-length fields are supported (handled by Uniface). For more information, see Entity Definitions for TXT Files . Index Management The TXT connector cannot create indexes in text files. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
